events.title: Joseph of our time
events.description: A non-denominational 3-day program focusing on the theme "Joseph of our time".

events.title: Faithful Stewardship (Matt 25 : 13 - 30)
events.description:
22nd - 24th May 2025
22nd May: Deliverance Vigil 
Time: 11pm 
Venue: No. 2 John Owokade Str, Asalu Bus/stop, Abaranje, Ikotun, Lagos (Headquarters).

23rd May: Demonstrative Evangelism
Time: 3pm 
Venue: Headquarters.

24th May: Thanksgiving
Venue : No. 130 Abaranje rd, Opposite Ariyo hall, Abaranje, Ikotun, Lagos (Abaranje Branch).

Featuring: Drama, Exhortation, Prayer, Games, Worship and Praise, Panel Session for the Word And Many more.
